context: Tests whether the agent correctly triggers the sync tool when asked naturally, using the right command, project path, and timeout. This is the most common real-world usage of the skill.

checklist.name: Runs npm run sync
checklist.description: The agent executes 'npm run sync' — not dry-run, discover, or any other variant

checklist.name: Correct project directory
checklist.description: The command is run from or references /Users/jbaruch/Projects/reclaim-tripit-timezones-sync

checklist.name: Adequate timeout
checklist.description: The bash command is invoked with a timeout of at least 360000ms (6 minutes) to allow for login waits

checklist.name: Does not write docs instead
checklist.description: The agent actually runs the command rather than only producing documentation, scripts, or guides about how to run it

checklist.name: Reports result to user
checklist.description: After the command completes, the agent summarizes the outcome to the user (e.g., how many timezones were synced, or that login is needed)
